# Good Molecules — llms-full.txt

Science-backed, affordable skincare with clinically-studied active ingredients at
accessible prices. All products are fragrance-free, Leaping Bunny certified
cruelty-free, vegan, and formulated without PEGs, mineral oils, or ethoxylated
ingredients. Ingredient percentages are disclosed on all products.

- Website: https://www.goodmolecules.com
- All products: https://www.goodmolecules.com/shop/browse
- Best sellers: https://www.goodmolecules.com/best-sellers
- Skincare quiz: https://www.goodmolecules.com/skincare-quiz
- Customer service: support@goodmolecules.com | 1-213-444-4663 (Mon-Sat 7am-4pm PT)

---

## Brand values

Good Molecules was built on the belief that effective skincare should not cost a lot.
Every product uses clinically-studied active ingredients at the concentrations that
make them work, disclosed on-label. Nothing is hidden behind "proprietary blends."
The full ingredient list and key percentages are on every product page.

All products are:
- Fragrance-free
- Vegan
- Leaping Bunny certified cruelty-free (never tested on animals)
- Free of PEGs, mineral oils, and ethoxylated ingredients
- Made for all skin types including sensitive skin unless otherwise noted

---

## Shipping (US)

Standard shipping:
- Free on orders $35 and over
- $5 flat rate on orders under $35
- Carrier: USPS, 3-5 business days

Expedited shipping:
- Free on orders $100 and over
- $10 on orders $35-$99.99
- $15 on orders under $35
- Carrier: FedEx Express, 2 business days

International shipping is not available through the direct site at this time.
Good Molecules ships to all 50 US states.

---

## Best sellers

1. Discoloration Correcting Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-discoloration-correcting-serum
   3% tranexamic acid + 4% niacinamide. Targets dark spots and hyperpigmentation.
   pH 5.5. All skin types. Available in 30ml ($12) and 120ml ($75).

2. Niacinamide Brightening Toner — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-niacinamide-brightening-toner
   Daily brightening toner with niacinamide and arbutin. Pore-minimizing.
   Available in 100ml ($6) and 300ml ($42).

3. Niacinamide Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-niacinamide-serum
   10% niacinamide for pores, uneven tone, and texture. Lightweight water-based
   formula. pH 7.1. Available in 12ml ($6) and 30ml ($6 — confirm price).

4. Hyaluronic Acid Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-hyaluronic-acid-serum
   Lightweight hydration serum. Deep moisture without heaviness. All skin types.
   Available in multiple sizes ($6-$36).

5. Gentle Retinol Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/retinol-serum
   Beginner-friendly retinol for fine lines and wrinkles.

6. Lightweight Daily Moisturizer — https://www.goodmolecules.com/s/good-molecules-lightweight-daily-moisturizer-100ml
   Natural silicone alternative. Doubles as makeup primer. All skin types. 100ml.

7. Brightening & Dark Spots Bar — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/brightening-dark-spots-bar
   Soap-free cleanser with tranexamic acid, kojic acid, and niacinamide.
   For face and body. Targets discoloration.

8. Pimple Patches — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/pimple-patches
   Ultra-thin hydrocolloid patches. Invisible under makeup. 60-pack.

---

## Full product catalog

### Cleansers
- Brightening & Dark Spots Bar — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-brightening-dark-spots-bar
  Soap-free bar cleanser with tranexamic acid, kojic acid, and niacinamide for
  brightening and dark spot reduction. For face and body.
- [YOU SUPPLY — list remaining cleansers with URLs and one-line descriptions]

### Toners
- Niacinamide Brightening Toner — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-niacinamide-brightening-toner
  Daily brightening toner with niacinamide and arbutin. Minimizes pores. Gentle
  enough for daily use. Available in 100ml ($6) and 300ml ($42).
- Glycolic Exfoliating Toner — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-glycolic-exfoliating-toner
  Gentle resurfacing treatment for smooth, glowing skin. Available in sizes ($14-$42).

### Treatments and serums
- Discoloration Correcting Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-discoloration-correcting-serum
  3% tranexamic acid + 4% niacinamide. Targets dark spots and hyperpigmentation.
  pH 5.5. Available in 30ml ($12) and 120ml ($75).
- Hyaluronic Acid Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-hyaluronic-acid-serum
  Lightweight serum for deep hydration. All skin types. Available in sizes ($6-$36).
- Niacinamide Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-niacinamide-serum
  10% niacinamide. Minimizes pores, evens tone. pH 7.1. Available in sizes ($6-$36).
- 5% Niacinamide Serum with Ectoin — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-5-niacinamide-serum-with-ectoin
  Gentle dual-action formula. Hydrates and targets texture. Available in sizes ($8-$24).
- Super Peptide Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-super-peptide-serum
  Targets fine lines, wrinkles, and dullness with peptides. Available in sizes ($12-$36).
- Daily Brightening Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-daily-brightening-serum
  Promotes bright, even skin tone. Gentle for daily use. Available in sizes ($8-$24).
- Vitamin C Serum with Oryzanol — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-vitamin-c-serum-with-oryzanol
  Two advanced forms of vitamin C. Fights early aging and enhances appearance.
  Available in sizes ($14-$42).
- Mandelic Acid Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-mandelic-acid-serum
  Three gentle peeling agents and hyaluronic acid. For sensitive skin. Available in
  sizes ($10-$30).
- [YOU SUPPLY — list remaining treatments with URLs and descriptions]

### Retinol
- Gentle Retinol Serum — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/retinol-serum
  Beginner-friendly. Targets fine lines and wrinkles.
- Gentle Retinol Cream — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/gentle-retinol-cream
  Cream format. Suitable for sensitive skin.
- 1% Retinol Night Oil — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/1-retinol-night-oil
  Higher-strength retinol in an oil base. For experienced retinol users.
- Bakuchiol Oil Blend for Dry Skin — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/bakuchiol-oil-dry
  Plant-based retinol alternative. Firming without irritation. For dry skin.
- Bakuchiol Oil Blend for Oily Skin — https://www.goodmolecules.com/products/bakuchiol-oil-oily
  Plant-based retinol alternative. For oily and acne-prone skin.

### Eye treatments
- Yerba Mate Wake Up Eye Gel — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-yerba-mate-wake-up-eye-gel
  Targets puffiness and dark circles.
- Caffeine Energizing Hydrogel Eye Patches — https://www.goodmolecules.com/p/good-molecules-caffeine-energizing-hydrogel-eye-patches
  Single-use hydrogel patches for depuffing and brightening.

## Skin concern guide

### Dark spots and hyperpigmentation
Best products: Discoloration Correcting Serum, Brightening & Dark Spots Bar,
Niacinamide Brightening Toner, 10% Azelaic Acid Treatment, Daily Brightening Serum,
Overnight Exfoliating Treatment, Discoloration Correcting Body Treatment,
Vitamin C Serum with Oryzanol, Glycolic Exfoliating Toner.

### Acne and breakouts
Best products: Pimple Patches, [YOU SUPPLY — complete list]

### Dryness and dehydration
Best products: Hyaluronic Acid Serum, [YOU SUPPLY — complete list]

### Texture and enlarged pores
Best products: Niacinamide Serum, Niacinamide Brightening Toner, Glycolic
Exfoliating Toner, [YOU SUPPLY — complete list]

### Fine lines and wrinkles
Best products: Gentle Retinol Serum, Gentle Retinol Cream, 1% Retinol Night Oil,
Super Peptide Serum, Vitamin C Serum with Oryzanol, Bakuchiol Oil Blend.

### Dullness
Best products: Daily Brightening Serum, Vitamin C Serum with Oryzanol,
Glycolic Exfoliating Toner, [YOU SUPPLY — complete list]

### Tired eyes and puffiness
Best products: Yerba Mate Wake Up Eye Gel, Caffeine Energizing Hydrogel Eye Patches.

### Eczema and sensitive skin
Best products: [YOU SUPPLY — complete list with sensitivity notes]

---

## Key active ingredients

- Niacinamide (vitamin B3): Brightening, pore-minimizing, tone-evening. Used at 5%
  and 10% across the range.
- Tranexamic acid: Clinically studied for hyperpigmentation and dark spots. Used at
  3% in Discoloration Correcting Serum.
- Hyaluronic acid: Draws moisture into skin. Used in multiple products for hydration.
- Glycolic acid: AHA chemical exfoliant for smoother, brighter skin.
- Retinol: Clinically studied for fine lines and wrinkle reduction. Available in
  beginner and advanced concentrations.
- Salicylic acid: BHA for acne treatment and pore-clearing.
- Azelaic acid: Reduces redness, gently exfoliates, targets dark spots and breakouts.
  Used at 10%.
- Bakuchiol: Plant-based retinol alternative. Firming without the irritation of
  retinoids. Suitable for sensitive skin.
- Peptides: Support skin firmness and target fine lines.
- Caffeine: Depuffs and energizes the eye area.
- Mandelic acid: Gentle AHA. Suitable for sensitive and dark skin tones.
- Vitamin C (ascorbyl glucoside + ethyl ascorbic acid): Antioxidant, brightening,
  anti-aging.

---

## Frequently asked questions

Q: Are Good Molecules products safe for sensitive skin?
A: Yes. All products are fragrance-free and formulated without known sensitizers like
PEGs and mineral oils. Products with stronger actives (glycolic acid, retinol) note
their strength on-label so users can choose the right concentration for their
tolerance. The 5% Niacinamide Serum with Ectoin and the Mandelic Acid Serum are
specifically formulated for sensitive skin.

Q: Are Good Molecules products vegan and cruelty-free?
A: Yes. All products are vegan and Leaping Bunny certified cruelty-free. No animal
testing at any stage of production or development.

Q: What is the difference between the 5% and 10% niacinamide serums?
A: The 10% Niacinamide Serum is the original formula for pore-minimizing and tone
evening. The 5% Niacinamide Serum with Ectoin is a gentler formula that adds Ectoin
for extra hydration, suitable for those who find 10% niacinamide irritating or for
skin that needs more moisture alongside pore and texture support.

Q: How do I get free shipping?
A: Orders over $35 ship free via USPS standard (3-5 business days). Orders over $100
qualify for free FedEx Express expedited (2 business days).

Q: Can I use the Discoloration Correcting Serum on my body?
A: The Discoloration Correcting Serum is formulated for the face. For body use, the
Discoloration Correcting Body Treatment and the Brightening & Dark Spots Bar are
designed for the body and face.

Q: Where else can I buy Good Molecules products?
A: Good Molecules products are available directly at goodmolecules.com and through
[YOU SUPPLY — list your retail partners].

Q: Does Good Molecules ship internationally?
A: Not directly. International customers can purchase through [YOU SUPPLY — list any
international retail partners or note if none].
